title: Fix persistent error page after paste creation

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the persistent error page that appears after attempting to create a paste, despite Version 14 deployment addressing the previous error

quotes: Still having the same issue and same error page.

acceptanceCriteria: Creating a new paste successfully redirects to the paste view page without error
No error page is displayed after paste creation
The paste is accessible at its generated URL

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error logging to the paste creation flow in useQueries.ts to capture the exact error occurring during paste creation, including backend error details, network failures, and response data
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs show detailed error information when paste creation fails
Error messages include backend response details and error types
Error handling distinguishes between network failures, backend errors, and unexpected failures

requirements.text: Verify that the backend createPaste method correctly returns paste IDs and handles all edge cases including file uploads, password protection, and expiration settings
acceptanceCriteria: createPaste returns a valid paste ID for all valid input combinations
File uploads are correctly stored and associated with the paste
Password protection and expiration settings are properly applied
Backend logs show successful paste creation without errors

requirements.text: Ensure the frontend properly handles the paste creation response and correctly constructs the redirect URL using the returned paste ID
acceptanceCriteria: The paste ID from the backend response is correctly extracted
The redirect URL is properly formatted with the paste ID in the hash
Navigation to the paste view page occurs immediately after successful creation

constraints: Do not modify the Internet Identity authentication flow
Preserve existing paste data and user profiles
Maintain backward compatibility with legacy paste IDs
nonGoals: Changing the overall paste creation UI/UX
Modifying unrelated features like history page or paste viewing
Adding new paste features or capabilities
